allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe node 2>$null; where.exe npm 2>$null; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5; Get-ChildItem "$env:NVM_HOME" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|nvm' } | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|nvm' } | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|nvm' } | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(Get-ItemProperty "HKCU:\\Environment" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object PATH; Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Control\\Session Manager\\Environment" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Path 2>$null | ForEach-Object { $_ -split ';' } | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|nvm' })
